# Topeka SEO & PPC

> Topeka SEO & PPC (topekasearch.com) is a local marketing agency in Topeka, Kansas. It is a DBA of Paradigm LLC and a local arm of ServiceLine Pro. The agency publishes all prices upfront and takes only one client per industry in Topeka.

## What makes it different
- Prices are published on every service page. No quote-gating.
- $0 agency fee on paid advertising (Google, Microsoft, streaming). 100% of the client's budget funds the campaigns.
- One client per industry in Topeka. When a category is claimed, it is exclusive.

## Services and pricing
- Local SEO: $2,500/month (includes a complimentary 10-day ranking boost).
- AI SEO (Generative Engine Optimization): $1,500/month (requires an active Local SEO subscription).
- PPC Management (Google + Microsoft): $0 agency fee, client picks the budget.
- Google Ads Management: $0 agency fee.
- Microsoft & Bing Ads Management: $0 agency fee.
- ChatGPT Ads Management: $500/month flat management fee plus ad budget.
- Apple Maps Ads Management: $500/month flat management fee plus ad budget.
- Yelp Ads Management: $500/month flat management fee plus ad budget.
- Local Services Ads (Google Guaranteed): $500/month flat management fee plus pay-per-lead budget.
- OTT & Streaming TV Ads: $0 agency fee, free professional video production via Butel Media Group.
- Web Design: $250/month (unlimited pages, unlimited updates, hosting, speed-to-lead; one-time builds available).
- Branding & Logo Design: $750 logo package; full identity quoted per project.
- Social Media Marketing: $750/month; paid social at $0 agency fee.

## Key pages
- Home: https://topekasearch.com/

- Contact: https://topekasearch.com/contact/

## Track record (via ServiceLine Pro)
- Map Pack rank moved from 17.6 to 4.7 in 6 days.
- Google Ads at $0 agency fee producing 461% ROI and a $2M+ pipeline.
- Websites returning more than 1,000% ROI.
